overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long ORLY Daily ETF (ORLG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in consumer discretionary equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of OReilly Auto Parts (Nasdaq: ORLY) stock, less fees, and expenses. ORLY is a retailer and distributor of automotive replacement parts, tools, and accessories. ORLG was launched on Jan 15, 2026 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
